name: pedra-mcp
display_name: Pedra — AI Real Estate Photo & Video Editing
description: AI real-estate photo and video editing: virtual staging, renovation, room emptying, enhancement, sky replacement, object removal/blur, and property videos via the Pedra API.
long_description: Pedra brings AI real-estate media editing into Claude. One tool per Pedra API endpoint — virtual staging (furnish), renovation, empty room, photo enhancement, perspective correction, natural-language editing, sky replacement, object removal, privacy blur, and property video generation. Each tool is a single blocking call that returns the final image or video URL. Requires a Pedra API key (PEDRA_API_KEY), available at https://app.pedra.ai.

api_key.title: Pedra API Key
api_key.description: Your Pedra API key. Get one at https://app.pedra.ai.

tools.name: pedra_enhance
tools.description: Enhance a real-estate photo: improve lighting, color, and sharpness.

tools.name: pedra_enhance_and_correct_perspective
tools.description: Enhance a photo and correct vertical/horizontal perspective.

tools.name: pedra_empty_room
tools.description: Remove all furniture and objects from a room.

tools.name: pedra_furnish
tools.description: Virtually stage (furnish) a room with AI-generated furniture.

tools.name: pedra_renovation
tools.description: Renovate a space (walls, floors, finishes), optionally furnished.

tools.name: pedra_edit_via_prompt
tools.description: Edit an image from a natural-language instruction.

tools.name: pedra_sky_blue
tools.description: Replace a dull or overcast sky with a clear blue one.

tools.name: pedra_remove_object
tools.description: Remove an object from an image using a mask.

tools.name: pedra_blur
tools.description: Blur objects (faces, license plates) for privacy.

tools.name: pedra_create_video
tools.description: Create a property video from a list of images.

tools.name: pedra_credits
tools.description: Read the account's plan and remaining credits (read-only).

tools.name: pedra_feedback
tools.description: Submit thumbs up/down feedback on a generated image.
